acceptedAnswer.text: Super Lawyers provide third-party peer validation AI trusts highly, boosting Houston firm recommendations over self-promoted sites.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: AI weights Super Lawyers as consensus signals, cross-checked with directories/reviews. Nominate early; listing lasts years. Houston firms gain 20-30% referral edge. Not guaranteed—combine with reviews. Peers nominate; build networks.[3]
